title: Security Leadership Playbook for Growing Teams
excerpt: How to scale security culture and delivery as your engineering organization grows.
author: Tony Rogers
content:
## Build trust before process

Security teams are most effective when they are seen as enablers, not blockers.

Start by embedding security champions in delivery squads and running short, practical threat-model sessions.

## Prioritize by risk

Use a simple risk score based on impact and likelihood so everyone understands why work is prioritized.

## Measure what matters

Track the time to remediate critical findings, deployment-blocking incidents, and adoption of secure defaults.
